name: reopen_section
description: Reopen a section when the user changes an answer, spots a mistake, or adds missing information that belongs to an earlier part of the N-400 flow.

section.description: The section to reopen. One of INTRO, PERSONAL_INFO, RESIDENCE_HISTORY, FAMILY_INFO, EMPLOYMENT, TRAVEL, MORAL_CHARACTER, OATH, or REVIEW.

reason.description: Why the section needs to be reopened.
